name: Borealis Control Plane
story: Borealis exposes a single public control-plane port, but the application behind it is larger than it first appears. Support tooling leaks account data, authorization decisions trust caller-controlled values, a project query is assembled unsafely, and a renderer can reach a local-only admin service. Your mission is to chain those flaws until the internal import path reveals the final flag.
objectives: Chain account discovery, auth bypass, SQL injection, SSRF, and an internal import primitive behind a single public web endpoint.

steps.title: Find the support leak
steps.description: Probe password reset behavior and identify the field that leaks account role data.
steps.question: Which JSON field exposes the reset target account details?

hints.text: Send a reset request for a known account.

steps.title: Bypass login
steps.description: Exploit the raw SQL login query and become admin.
steps.question: Which role must /api/login return after the bypass?

hints.text: The email field is interpolated into SQL.
A classic quote-based boolean payload works.

steps.title: Identify the project injection
steps.description: Find the query parameter that is inserted directly into the projects SQL query.
steps.question: Which parameter on /api/projects is injectable?

hints.text: Try changing the project owner filter.

steps.title: Extract the vault token
steps.description: Use UNION-based SQL injection to read the secret needed by the internal service.
steps.question: What vault token is stored in the secrets table?

hints.text: The projects query returns three columns.
The secrets table contains key and value columns.

steps.title: Reach the local-only admin service
steps.description: Abuse the renderer SSRF path to query the internal vault service.
steps.question: Which internal endpoint reveals the import path when given the token?

hints.text: The renderer accepts loopback URLs on port 3001.
Use the recovered token as a query parameter.

steps.title: Capture the final flag
steps.description: Use the internal import clue while authenticated as admin and recover the flag.
steps.question: What is the captured flag?

hints.text: Keep the admin session cookie from the login bypass.
